feature1.title: Overseas Special Data
feature1.description: Deep cultivation of precise data collection, integration, and analysis in the overseas CP field, covering core data dimensions of overseas markets; overseas field road test collection, road condition data summary, overseas network/scenario data review.

feature2.title: Vertical Domain Data
feature2.description: Full-category music industry data monitoring, copyright data, market data, audience data summary analysis; automotive real-time road conditions, driving data, scene data collection and in-depth summary.

feature3.title: Industry-General Data
feature3.description: Covering full-industry global network data crawling, screening, cleaning, compliant collection; multi-dimensional data review, trend analysis, data report output, core conclusion extraction.

feature4.title: Basic Information Services
feature4.description: Industry basic information integration, data query, information push, data sharing and docking and other supporting services.

case1.title: Testing Research
case1.description: Targeted scene testing, data verification, effect monitoring, test data summary analysis, providing customers with accurate test results and data support.

case2.title: Certification Research
case2.description: Industry certification standard interpretation, qualification pre-judgment analysis, certification passability assessment, certification-related data research, helping customers successfully pass various certifications.

case3.title: Competitive Analysis Research
case3.description: Full-dimensional competitor data analysis, advantage and disadvantage comparison, market share analysis, competitive strategy research, providing customers with comprehensive competitive intelligence.

case4.title: Market Research
case4.description: Industry market trends, audience needs, market size, development prospects and other global research, providing data support for customers' strategic decisions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions about hirotaku
faq.question1: What file formats are supported for export?
faq.answer1: We support various file formats for export, including CSV, JSON, Excel and other common formats. At the same time, we can also directly connect the data to your enterprise internal database or BI tools.
faq.answer2: Most websites can be collected, but we will comply with the website's robots.txt protocol and relevant laws and regulations. For websites that require login or have anti-crawling mechanisms, we will use professional technical means to ensure stable collection.
faq.answer3: Our services strictly comply with relevant laws and regulations. We only collect public, non-personal sensitive information, and conduct compliance assessments before collection. We recommend that customers also comply with relevant legal regulations when using collected data.
faq.answer4: Yes, we support website data collection worldwide. We have distributed collection nodes that can effectively cope with access restrictions from websites in different regions.
faq.question5: Can you integrate with BI tools?
faq.answer5: Of course. We support integration with various mainstream BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, FineReport, etc. We can also customize data interfaces according to your needs.
